name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students (Technical Degree)
summary: Scholarship support for girl students admitted to first year technical degree courses or second year technical degree courses through lateral entry in AICTE-approved institutions.
benefits: Rs. 50,000 per annum for every year of study, up to 4 years for first-year admitted degree students.
Up to 3 years of support for students admitted into second year through lateral entry.
The amount is a lump sum for college fee, computer, stationery, books, equipment, software, and related education expenses.
required_documents: Valid family income certificate issued by State/UT Government
Academic details from the qualifying examination
Institution verification through the National Scholarship Portal
For renewal, passing certificate or marksheet and letter from the Head of Institution
eligibility_text: Applicant should be a girl student.
Applicant should be admitted to first year of a degree-level technical course, or second year of a degree-level technical course through lateral entry.
Maximum two girl children per family are eligible.
Family income from all sources should not be more than Rs. 8 lakh per annum.
Applicant should not be receiving another scholarship or financial assistance from another source during the course.
application_steps: Go to the National Scholarship Portal.
Complete registration or login using the official NSP flow.
Select the AICTE Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students (Technical Degree), if available for the current academic year.
Fill academic, institution, income, and other required details only on the official portal.
Submit the application before the student deadline.
Track institute and nodal verification status on the official portal.

application_window.notes: Application window captured from NSP All Scholarships listing. Verify again on NSP before advising a real user.

sources.title: Guidelines for AICTE Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students (Degree)
